mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_schedule (course_id, period, date, status, title, start_date, end_date) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{period}, IFNULL(#{date}, NOW()), #{status}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate} )

INSERT INTO test_detail( question_no, course_id, period, content, option1, option2, option3, option4, answer, score, comment ) VALUES
( #{item.questionNo}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.period}, #{item.content}, #{item.option1}, #{item.option2}, #{item.option3}, #{item.option4}, #{item.answer}, #{item.score}, #{item.comment})
mapper.update: UPDATE test_schedule SET status = 0 WHERE end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date < CURDATE() AND status != 0
mapper.select: SELECT course_id, title FROM course c WHERE professor = #{loginId} OR sub_prof = #{loginId} ORDER BY 1,2

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.score), 0) FROM test_detail t JOIN student_test_answer a ON t.course_id = a.course_id AND t.period = a.period AND t.question_no = a.question_no WHERE a.loginID = #{studentId} AND t.course_id = #{courseId} AND t.period = #{period} AND t.answer = a.student_answer

SELECT t.course_id AS courseId, t.period, ts.title, a.loginID AS studentId, u.name AS studentName, t.question_no AS questionNo, t.content, t.option1, t.option2, t.option3, t.option4, t.answer AS correctAnswer, a.student_answer AS studentAnswer, t.comment, (CASE WHEN t.answer = a.student_answer THEN t.score ELSE 0 END) AS earnedScore FROM test_detail t JOIN test_schedule ts ON t.course_id = ts.course_id AND t.period = ts.period LEFT JOIN student_test_answer a ON t.course_id = a.course_id AND t.period = a.period AND t.question_no = a.question_no AND a.loginID = #{studentId} JOIN tb_userinfo u ON (a.loginID = u.loginID) WHERE t.course_id = #{courseId} AND t.period = #{period} ORDER BY t.question_no
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM test_detail WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND period = #{period}
DELETE FROM test_schedule WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND period = #{period}
DELETE FROM student_test_answer WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND period = #{period}
DELETE FROM student_test_schedule WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND period = #{period}
mapper.select: SELECT ui.loginID as studentId, ui.name as studentName, sc.course_id as courseId, #{period} as period, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(td.score), 0) FROM student_test_answer sta JOIN test_detail td ON sta.course_id = td.course_id AND sta.period = td.period AND sta.question_no = td.question_no WHERE sta.loginID = ui.loginID AND sta.course_id = sc.course_id AND sta.period = #{period} AND sta.student_answer = td.answer ) as earnedScore, IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_test_answer WHERE loginID = ui.loginID AND course_id = sc.course_id AND period = #{period}) > 0, 'Y', 'N') as isSubmitted FROM tb_userinfo ui JOIN student_course sc ON ui.loginID = sc.loginID WHERE sc.course_id = #{couredddseId} AND sc.stu_cou_sta_code = 0 /* 수강 중인 학생만 조회 */

SELECT t.course_id AS courseId, t.period, ts.title, t.question_no AS questionNo, t.content, t.option1, t.option2, t.option3, t.option4, t.answer AS correctAnswer, t.comment, t.score /* 배점 정보 추가 */ FROM test_detail t JOIN test_schedule ts ON t.course_id = ts.course_id AND t.period = ts.period WHERE t.course_id = #{courseId} AND t.period = #{period} ORDER BY t.question_no ASC
